ddt:Target.Name: R2_08 v3_9
ddt:Target.Description:
******************** HISTORY ********************
v0.1 August 2006 : Creation
v3.1 February 2008 : Modification by Nicolas HUBY - Update of Auto-Identification for Sw 34.13 v3.2 March 2008 : Modification by Nicolas HUBY - Removal of parameter BT_Version - Add of Sw 28.02 for Auto_identification v3.3 March 2008 : Modification by Nicolas HUBY - Update of Auto-Identification for Sw 36.02 / 36.07 v3.4 April 2008 : Modification by Nicolas HUBY - Update of Auto-Identification for Sw 38.02 / 40.07 / 40.15 V3.5 May 2008 : Update by Lionel Pelletier - Update of Auto-Identification for Sw 38.07 / 42.01 / 42.11 - correction of bt rssi IOC - Update of screens V3.6 June 2008 : Update of HwBasicPartList HARDW
V3.7 July 2008 : - Update by Naïké DURAND - Enhancement of screens. - Addition of NFA presence configuration. V3.8 December 2008 : - Enhancement of screens. - Update of auto identification for Sw 48.12
V3.9 February 2010 : - Update by Cedric Guengant - Add identification between amplifer with CAN and without CAN (X95 Bose) - Add identification between H45 configuration and other vehicle - Add test I/O control for subwofer - Update of auto identification for Sw 84.15/88.10/90.00

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: VIN.CRC
Data.Comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

Item.Text: reserved (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 6 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 7 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 8 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 9 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 10 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 11 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 12 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 13 (same thing for all value equal or higher)
reserved 14 (same thing for all value equal or higher)

Data.Name: Alarm_code
Data.Comment: code to be stored in world wide Renault database

Data.Name: Last AS operation.year
Data.Comment: Year of Last after sales operation date

Data.Name: TUNER2.antenna field mean
Data.Comment: antenna field Mean [dBuV], average value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: TUNER2.antenna field min
Data.Comment: antenna field Min [dBuV], minimum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: TUNER2.Frequency value
Data.Comment: Frequency Tune $xxx.x, [MHz], 0.1MHz step if FM$xxxx [KHz], 9KHz step if LW

Data.Name: TUNER1.antenna field max
Data.Comment: antenna field Max [dBuV], maximum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: TUNER1.Frequency value
Data.Comment: Frequency Tune $xxx.x, [MHz], 0.1MHz step if FM$xxxx [KHz], 9KHz step if LW

Data.Name: TUNER1.antenna field min
Data.Comment: antenna field Min [dBuV], minimum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: TUNER1.antenna field mean
Data.Comment: antenna field Mean [dBuV], average value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: TUNER2.antenna field max
Data.Comment: antenna field Max [dBuV], maximum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: Number_of_CD_inserted
Data.Comment: Number of CD inserted in CD changer

Data.Name: Last AS operation.day
Data.Comment: Day of Last after sales operation date

Data.Name: LIN_WK.Sys_ON
Data.Comment: Sys_ON multimedia wake up from BICA2A3

Data.Name: Dimming
Data.Comment: Illumination control level (dimming from CD Changer)

Data.Name: Last AS operation.month
Data.Comment: Month of Last after sales operation date

Data.Name: CANMMUX.Ref Messagerie
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

Data.Name: CANMMUX.CBOX counter
Data.Comment: Hand free car kit fault counter

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: OutputTemporaryControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Item.Text: Request for availibility LID from 0 to 19
Request for availibility LID from 21 to 39
left hand drive (F...) / all cars (not H45)
right hand drive (GB...) / all cars (not H45)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: IOControl.Availibility
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartC0
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Label.Text: Don't Forget to write accoustic parameters
